base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of like_like_suck — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Like Like — brown cylindrical tube-creature. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Like Like — brown cylindrical tube-creature; 4-frame wave + engulf-Link animation; eats Link's Magical Shield if grabbed
